ddls:
CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "head_of_department" TEXT /* Name of the department head */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the department */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the department */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the department record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the department record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budgets" (
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget record */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department receiving the budget */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the budget allocation */,
  "amount_allocated" REAL /* Amount allocated for the year */,
  "budget_category" TEXT /* Category of the budget (e.g., operational, capital) */,
  "fiscal_year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fiscal year table */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the budget allocation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the budget record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the budget record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("budget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budgets_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budgets_fiscal_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("fiscal_year_id") REFERENCES fiscal_years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expenditures" (
  "expenditure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expenditure record */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department that spent the funds */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of expenditure */,
  "amount_spent" REAL /* Amount spent in that year */,
  "expenditure_category" TEXT /* Category of the expenditure (e.g., salaries, equipment) */,
  "fiscal_year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fiscal year table */,
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vendor involved in the expenditure */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the expenditure */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the expenditure record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the expenditure record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expenditure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expenditures_vendor_id FOREIGN KEY ("vendor_id") REFERENCES vendor_info ("vendor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expenditures_fiscal_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("fiscal_year_id") REFERENCES fiscal_years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expenditures_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fiscal_years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fiscal year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Name of the fiscal year (e.g., 2014) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the fiscal year */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the fiscal year */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the fiscal year record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the fiscal year record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "total_expenditures" (
  "total_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each total expenditure record */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total expenditure amount calculated from expenditures */,
  "fiscal_year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fiscal year table */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the total expenditure record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the total expenditure record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("total_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_total_expenditures_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_total_expenditures_fiscal_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("fiscal_year_id") REFERENCES fiscal_years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, department head, auditor) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser used */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budget_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department for which the report is generated */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., annual, quarterly) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the generated report file */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_reports_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vendor_info" (
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vendor */,
  "vendor_name" TEXT /* Name of the vendor */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the vendor */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department that uses the vendor */,
  "vendor_type" TEXT /* Type of the vendor (e.g., contractor, supplier) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the vendor */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the vendor record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the vendor record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vendor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vendor_info_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)
